title: gnverifier: A command-line client for scientific name verification
description: GNverifier is a fast command-line tool and Go library for verifying scientific names against a variety of biodiversity data sources. It supports exact and fuzzy matching, batch processing, and returns results in JSON, CSV, or TSV formats. It acts as a client to the GNames verification API.

creators.name: Mozzherin, Dmitry
creators.affiliation: Species File Group, University of Illinois
